---
title: CV - Marie Dupont
author: "Marie Dupont"
format:
  quarto-cv-typst: default
date: 2026-05-01
date-prefix: "Last updated: "
execute:
  echo: false

# =============================================================================
# STEP 1 — Choose a theme (uncomment one line)
# =============================================================================
metadata-files:
  - themes/classic-blue.yml    # blue professional (default)
  # - themes/forest-green.yml    # natural green
  # - themes/minimal-dark.yml    # dark sidebar
  # - themes/warm-terracotta.yml # earthy terracotta

# =============================================================================
# STEP 2 — Personal info
# =============================================================================
sidebar:
  photo: "assets/img/image.png"
  phone: "+33 6 12 34 56 78"
  email: "marie.dupont@example.com"
  birthdate: "15/03/1995"
  city: "Paris, France"
  nationality: "French"
  permit: "Driving License B"
  website: "https://mariedupont.dev"
  website-display: "mariedupont.dev"
  linkedin: "https://linkedin.com/in/marie-dupont"
  linkedin-display: "\\@marie-dupont"
  github: "https://github.com/mdupont"
  github-display: "\\@mdupont"

# =============================================================================
# STEP 3 — Sidebar sections
# =============================================================================
sidebar-sections:

  - id: photo
    style:
      section-before: 2em
      photo-size: 100pt
      photo-radius: 50%
      photo-border: true
      photo-border-width: 4pt
      section-after: 3em

  - id: contact
    title: "Contact"
    items:
      - type: phone
      - type: email
      - type: city
      - type: birthdate
      - type: nationality
      - type: permit
      - type: linkedin
      - type: github
    style:
      item-after: 0em
      section-after: 3em

  - id: languages
    title: "Languages"
    items:
      - name: "French"
        value: "Native"
      - name: "English"
        value: "C1 — Fluent"
      - name: "Spanish"
        value: "B2 — Intermediate"
    style:
      text-size: 10pt

  - id: skills
    title: "IT Skills"
    items:
      - category: "Languages"
        items: "Python, R, SQL, JavaScript"
      - category: "ML / Data"
        items: "scikit-learn, XGBoost, MLflow"
      - category: "Tools"
        items: "Git, Docker, VS Code, Quarto"
      - category: "Cloud"
        items: "Azure ML, GCP BigQuery"
    style:
      text-size: 9.5pt

  - id: strengths
    title: "Strengths"
    items:
      - "Analytical mindset"
      - "Team collaboration"
      - "Fast learner"
      - "Written communication"
    style:
      text-size: 10pt

# =============================================================================
# Header: name, title, objective — colors inherit from active theme
# =============================================================================
cv-header:
  name: "Marie Dupont"
  title: "Data Scientist · ML Engineer"
  objective: >-
    Seeking a data science position where I can apply statistical modelling and
    machine-learning expertise to build impactful data products in a collaborative
    environment.
---

# Education

::: {.timeline}

## 2021 - 2023 | MSc Data Science & Artificial Intelligence

*École Polytechnique, Paris | Valedictorian — mention Très Bien*

Coursework: statistical learning, deep learning, NLP, causal inference, distributed computing.

## 2018 - 2021 | BSc Mathematics & Computer Science

*Université Paris-Saclay | Ranked 3rd / 120*

Strong foundation in probability, linear algebra, algorithms and software engineering.

:::

# Professional Experience

::: {.timeline levels="2,3,4"}

## Jan. 2024 - Present | Data Scientist

*BNP Paribas, Paris*

Developed an end-to-end ML pipeline for credit-risk scoring (XGBoost + SHAP explainability),
reducing false-positive rate by 18 %. Tech stack: Python, MLflow, Azure ML, SQL Server.

## Apr. 2023 - Dec. 2023 | ML Research Intern

*INRIA – TAU Team, Saclay*

Investigated fairness in ranking algorithms for job-search platforms (project **FairRank**).
Published results at ECML-PKDD 2023 workshop.

## Jun. 2022 - Aug. 2022 | Data Engineering Intern

*Criteo, Paris*

Built real-time feature pipelines with Apache Kafka and Spark Structured Streaming.
Reduced daily batch latency by 35 %.

## 2021 | Volunteer Data Analyst

*Médecins Sans Frontières, remote*

Cleaned and visualised epidemiological datasets to support field reporting.

:::

# Projects & Publications

::: {.timeline}

## 2023 | FairRank — Fairness-aware Learning-to-Rank

*ECML-PKDD 2023 workshop paper*

Proposed a post-processing re-ranking algorithm that reduces demographic bias while
preserving NDCG@10 within 2 % of the unconstrained baseline.

## 2022 | OpenCV Sudoku Solver

*Personal project — [github.com/mdupont/sudoku-solver](https://github.com/mdupont/sudoku-solver)*

Real-time Sudoku detection and solving pipeline using OpenCV and a CNN digit classifier
(99.1 % accuracy on MNIST).

:::
